.retry-template.script:
mkdir -p reports
echo "attempt=$LIBCI_JOB_RETRY_ATTEMPT / max=$LIBCI_JOB_RETRY_MAX"
printf 'attempt=%s\n' "$LIBCI_JOB_RETRY_ATTEMPT" >> "reports/${CI_JOB_NAME}.attempts.log"
test "$LIBCI_JOB_RETRY_ATTEMPT" -ge "$SUCCESS_AT_ATTEMPT"
printf 'success_at=%s\n' "$LIBCI_JOB_RETRY_ATTEMPT" > "reports/${CI_JOB_NAME}.status"

retry-on-script-failure.script:
mkdir -p reports
echo "attempt=$LIBCI_JOB_RETRY_ATTEMPT / max=$LIBCI_JOB_RETRY_MAX"
printf 'attempt=%s\n' "$LIBCI_JOB_RETRY_ATTEMPT" >> "reports/${CI_JOB_NAME}.attempts.log"
test "$LIBCI_JOB_RETRY_ATTEMPT" -ge "$SUCCESS_AT_ATTEMPT"
printf 'success_at=%s\n' "$LIBCI_JOB_RETRY_ATTEMPT" > "reports/${CI_JOB_NAME}.status"

retry-on-timeout.script:
mkdir -p reports
echo "simulate timeout for retry"
printf 'attempt=%s\n' "$LIBCI_JOB_RETRY_ATTEMPT" >> reports/retry-on-timeout.attempts.log
printf 'timeout_expected=true\n' > reports/retry-on-timeout.status
sleep 10

retry-on-any-failure.script:
mkdir -p reports
echo "attempt=$LIBCI_JOB_RETRY_ATTEMPT / max=$LIBCI_JOB_RETRY_MAX"
printf 'attempt=%s\n' "$LIBCI_JOB_RETRY_ATTEMPT" >> "reports/${CI_JOB_NAME}.attempts.log"
test "$LIBCI_JOB_RETRY_ATTEMPT" -ge "$SUCCESS_AT_ATTEMPT"
printf 'success_at=%s\n' "$LIBCI_JOB_RETRY_ATTEMPT" > "reports/${CI_JOB_NAME}.status"
